definition_of_done: Create .github/workflows/pr-validation.yml with unit tests, integration tests, linting, and type checking
Create .github/workflows/release.yml that builds Docker images on merge to main or tag push
Update README.md with CI/CD setup instructions
Configure all workflows to use GitHub Secrets for sensitive data
required_tests: PR validation workflow runs on pull request to main
Unit tests pass in PR validation
Integration tests pass in PR validation
Linting and type checking pass in PR validation
Release workflow triggers on merge to main
Docker image builds successfully in release workflow
Staging deployment workflow can be manually triggered
